bio: Millions of users rely on Grammarly's AI-powered products to make their messages, documents, and social media posts clear, mistake-free, and impactful.

repos.name: rocker
repos.description: Rocker breaks the limits of Dockerfile.

repos.description: Official implementation of the papers "GECToR – Grammatical Error Correction: Tag, Not Rewrite" (BEA-20) and "Text Simplification by Tagging" (BEA-21)

repos.description: Program user interfaces the FRP way.

repos.name: rocker-compose
repos.description: Docker composition tool with idempotency features for deploying apps composed of multiple containers.
